title: Brevo vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo vs Klaviyo: pricing, features, e-commerce capabilities. Find the best email marketing platform for your business.
h1: Brevo vs Klaviyo: Detailed Comparison for Email Marketing
intro: Both Brevo and Klaviyo are established email marketing platforms founded in 2012, but they serve different business needs. Brevo excels as an all-in-one CRM with multi-channel capabilities, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation with advanced analytics. Choosing between them depends on your business model, budget, and required integrations.
choose_a_if: You need a generous free tier with up to 100,000 contacts
You want multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat) in one platform
You require transactional email API capabilities for sending order confirmations and notifications
You're looking for an integrated CRM alongside email marketing
Budget is a primary concern with lower starting costs
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce
You need advanced predictive analytics and AI-powered segmentation
Sophisticated automation flows and customer journey mapping are priorities
You want dedicated e-commerce features like product reviews integration
You prefer a platform purpose-built for online retailers

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your use case. Brevo is better for businesses needing affordable multi-channel marketing and CRM, while Klaviyo excels for e-commerce brands requiring advanced automation and predictive analytics. Brevo has better Trustpilot ratings, but Klaviyo has slightly higher G2 scores.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly more affordable, with a free tier supporting 100,000 contacts compared to Klaviyo's 500, and paid plans starting at $25 versus $45. However, Klaviyo may offer better value for e-commerce brands through its specialized features and integrations.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, you can export your contact lists and email templates from Klaviyo and import them into Brevo, though some automation logic may need to be reconfigured. Both platforms support standard data formats, making migration feasible, though you may want to use migration services for complex setups.
